raw.reason: The frame shows a single speaker in a medium-close interview shot. I've defined the person_bbox to include his head and upper body, and the face_bbox tightly around his facial features to ensure proper centering for a vertical crop.
Single speaker in an interview-style framing. The face bbox is centered on the head to guide the 9:16 crop, while the person bbox captures the upper body and shoulders.
Single speaker in an interview-style medium shot. Framing centered on the person's face and upper body.

The frame shows a primary speaker on the left and the back of an interviewer's head on the right. Following the rule to show at most two items and focusing on the active speaker, sit_center is used to frame the main subject while excluding the out-of-focus back of the second person's head.
Single speaker in an interview-style setting. The face_bbox is tightly cropped to the head to ensure proper horizontal centering for the 9:16 frame.
Single person seated in an interview setting. The framing focuses on the speaker's head and upper body.
